path.name: Gemma 3 F16 (F32 activations, online)
path.description: F16 weights with F32 activations, online decode attention, and explicit gate/up matmul kernel overrides.

closestMatches.notes: Experimental fused F32 pipeline variant for fast decode.
Diagnostic: same as gemma3-q4k-dequant-f32a-online but uses attention_small_f16kv.wgsl for prefill to isolate streaming attention bug.
Gemma 3 F16/F32 online path with streaming prefill attention instead of the small-tile prefill kernel.

mismatchDetails.repairHint: Choose a registry path whose subgroup and attention-kernel assumptions match the execution graph, or synthesize a new path id for this capability mix.

customRuntimeFacts.label: Linear attention runtime
customRuntimeFacts.summary: Linear-attention layers bypass raw kernel-path lowering and use recurrent runtime modules.

customRuntimeFacts.label: Execution graph only
customRuntimeFacts.summary: The checked-in conversion contract owns an execution graph but explicitly opts out of inline kernel-path lowering.
